CustomField.formula: CASE( Account__r.SW_Industry__c , 'AdTech and AdNetwork', 'AdTech and AdNetwork', 'Agency', 'Agency', 'Automotive and Transportation', 'Automotive', 'B2B Software','B2B Software', 'B2C Internet Services','B2C Internet Services', 'Banking and insurance','Banking and insurance', 'Classifieds','Classifieds', 'Consulting and Market Research','Consulting and Market Research', 'CPG, Food & Beverages','CPG', 'Data Integrators','Data Integrators', 'Education','Education', 'Equity Research','Equity Research', 'Financial services','Financial services', 'Gambling / Gaming','Gambling and Gaming', 'Hedge Funds and Asset Management','Hedge Funds and Asset Management', 'Investment Banking','Investment Banking', 'Investors','Investors', 'Logistics and Shipping','Logistics and Shipping', 'Other','Other', 'Payments','Payments', 'Pharma and Healthcare','Pharma and Healthcare', 'VC and Private Equity','Private Equity', 'Government Public Sector & Non Profit','Public Sector, Non Profit, Fraud and Compliance', 'Media and Entertainment','Publishers and Media', 'Retail / eCommerce','Retail and eCommerce', 'Telecom and Hardware','Telecom', 'Travel and Hospitality','Travel', 'Venture Capital','Venture Capital', text(Account__r.SW_Industry__c) )
CustomField.label: SW Industry
